{{CargoClone
|name=Royal Liu Bei
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=121
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Gene Simulation Power Checks -0.9%
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Dragon Minion Skin DEF +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Dragon Minion Skin DEF +50%
|}}
